data.title: AI quoting tool helps distributor Packer Fastener speed up ecommerce
data.description: The tool is designed to automate as much as 75% of quote transactions when it is released before the end of the year.

data.title: Former ecommerce CFO convicted of diverting $35 million into crypto
data.description: U.S. Attorney Charles Neil Floyd said Nevin Shetty “exploited his position of power and trust” and attempted to profit while concealing the transfers

data.title: Shopify partners with Liquid AI on product search, recommendations
data.description: In early testing, an AI recommendation system co-developed by the partners led to higher conversion rates than Shopify’s previous model, the companies said.

data.title: Albertsons expands Uber Eats partnership, connecting membership rewards
data.description: Already partnering with Uber Eats, the expansion gives all Albertsons loyalty members access to rewards in the Uber One membership program.

data.title: Newegg debuts storefront on Shein's marketplace
data.description: The launch brings Newegg's consumer electronics offerings to shoppers on the Shein marketplace with an eye on style-conscious female gamers.
